wordplay_note: An inertial whose name suggests crafted perfection
card_description: Wendy Wright (meaning "Wright = maker/craftsman") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *Ubik*. Anti-psi whose body deteriorates and mummifies as half-life entropy accelerates. Name note: An inertial whose name suggests crafted perfection. Her physical decay embodies the novel's theme of irreversible cosmic entropy. First appears in *Ubik*.

reference.brief: Anti-psi whose body deteriorates and mummifies as half-life entropy accelerates
reference.significance: Her physical decay embodies the novel's theme of irreversible cosmic entropy
